entry.title: New IDC W15P7T17D0100 awarded to AASKI TECHNOLOGY INC. for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Contracting Officers may request delegation of procurement authority (DPA) to issue task orders under the RS3 contract vehicle.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::OT::IGF
THIS CONTRACT WILL PROVIDE ACC-APG CUSTOMERS, OTHER PROGRAM EXECUTIVE OFFICES (PEOS), OTHER DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE (DOD) AGENCIES, AND OTHER FEDERAL AGENCIES WITH KNOWLEDGE BASED SUPPORT SERVICES FOR REQUIREMENTS WITH COMMAND, CONTROL, COMMUNICATIONS, COMPUTERS, INTELLIGENCE, SURVEILLANCE, AND RECONNAISSANCE (C4ISR) RELATED NEEDS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

entry.title: IDC W15P7T17D0100 (P00001) awarded to AASKI TECHNOLOGY INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Contracting Officers may request delegation of procurement authority (DPA) to issue task orders under the RS3 contract vehicle.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::OT::IGF
IN SUPPORT OF THE RS3 CONTRACT FOR C4ISR REQUIREMENTS, THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD AND DELETE CLAUSES TO/FROM THE BASE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

entry.title: IDC W15P7T17D0100 (P00002) awarded to AASKI TECHNOLOGY INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Contracting Officers may request delegation of procurement authority (DPA) to issue task orders under the RS3 contract vehicle.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PRINCIPAL NAICS CODE 541712 IS INVALID AND IS UNABLE TO CORRECT ON THE BASE CONTRACT ACTION REPORT (CAR) TO REFLECT THE CORRECT NAICS CODE 541715.
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MOD IS TO CHANGE THE FOLLOWING: CHANGE ADMIN OFFICE ADD MULTIPLE PAYMENTS CLAUSE FIX 252.216-7006 ORDERING _TBD UPDATE MINIMUM ORDER VALUE TO NEW SAT UPDATE NAICS CODE

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

entry.title: IDC W15P7T17D0100 (P00005) awarded to MAG DS CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Contracting Officers may request delegation of procurement authority (DPA) to issue task orders under the RS3 contract vehicle.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
EO 14042.
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE DEFENSE FEDERAL ACQUISITION REGULATION SUPPLEMENT (DFARS) CLAUSE 252.223-7999 TO IMPLEMENT E.O. 14042 ENSURING ADEQUATE COVID-19 SAFETY PROTOCOLS FOR FEDERAL CONTRACTORS, DFARS 252.219-7003, FEDERAL ACQUISITION REGULATION (FAR) 52.219-9, FAR 52.215-12, THE JUNETEENTH FEDERAL HOLIDAY, AND REPLACE ENTERPRISE-WIDE CONTRACTOR MANPOWER REPORTING (E-CMRA) WITH THE SYSTEM FOR AWARD MANAGEMENT (SAM).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

entry.title: IDC W15P7T17D0100 (P00006) awarded to MAG DS CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Contracting Officers may request delegation of procurement authority (DPA) to issue task orders under the RS3 contract vehicle.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION P00006 EXERCISES THE OPTIONAL ORDERING PERIOD IN THE BASE CONTRACT, ALLOWING ORDERS TO BE PLACED ON OR BEFORE 14 MAY 2027. THIS CONTRACT PROVIDES MISSION PARTNERS WITH KNOWLEDGE BASED SERVICES FOR REQUIREMENTS WITH COMMAND, CONTROL, COMPUTERS, COMMUNICATIONS, CYBER, INTELLIGENCE, SURVEILLANCE AND RECONNAISSANCE RELATED NEEDS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION, P0008, TO CONTRACT W15P7T-17-D-0101 IS TO: INCORPORATE INVOICING FOR RATES THAT DEVIATE FROM PROPOSED RATES IN SECTION G OF THIS CONTRACT. ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT.
